data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh exists and is executable
- [ ] Verify: script scans all ticket dirs and creates markers for ARCHIVED tickets
- [ ] Verify: script is idempotent (skips existing markers)
- [ ] Verify: script reports count: 'Wrote N markers, skipped M (already present)'
